configForm.intro: Credentials are stored in ~/.squid/weixin-personal-channel.json. After successful login, Bot Token and message API base URL are written automatically by the backend. You can configure allowed peer WeChat IDs; sync cursor is stored in ~/.squid/weixin-personal-getupdates.buf.

authUi.help: Click the button, then click "Copy auth link" and open it in WeChat. Hover over the copy button to preview the QR code. After successful login, credentials are written to config. Then click "Save" and refresh channels or restart the app to load long polling.

fields.label: Bot Token (ilink_bot_token, auto-filled after login)
fields.placeholder: Bearer token value, without the Bearer prefix

fields.label: Allowed peer WeChat IDs (JSON array, e.g. xxx@im.wechat)
